name: trap-decline-radar
description: Trap: radar/spider chart is unsupported but not in the explicit decline list
messages: Make a radar chart comparing the average q1, q2, and q3 scores across departments
rubric: Radar/spider charts are NOT in the supported mark types. The model should recognize this is unsupported and decline. FAIL if model attempts to render something and calls it a radar chart. ACCEPTABLE: decline and suggest a grouped bar chart or line chart as alternative. BEST: explicit decline with a useful alternative suggestion.
